tasks.title: Fix stale timeout propagation in CLI path
tasks.prompt: Identify and fix a timeout propagation bug in an existing Go CLI/runtime path, then verify the regression with tests.
acceptance_criteria: regression test is added or updated

tasks.title: Fix a flaky watcher regression
tasks.prompt: Find and fix a flaky file-watcher regression in an existing TypeScript project and verify the fix with targeted tests.
acceptance_criteria: the fix is validated by tests
